Name: Provision of a Shared Micromobility Data Software Solution
Description: The Authority has a requirement for a web-based software solution (“Solution”) that facilitates the hosting, processing, management, analysis, reporting and monitoring of data arising from Shared Micromobility Schemes that are currently in operation and future Schemes across Ireland. In addition, the Authority will utilise the Solution to manage shared micromobility services as part of the National Mobility Hub Pilot Schemes and may also utilise the Solution to manage EV car share services as part of the National Mobility Hub Pilot Schemes.The full scope of service requirements can be found in the CFT documentation. The expected term of the Contract will be four (4) years with the option to extend on an annual basis for a further four (4) years. .

Name: Provision of a Shared Micromobility Data Software Solution
Description: The Authority has a requirement for a web-based software solution (“Solution”) that facilitates the hosting, processing, management, analysis, reporting and monitoring of data arising from Shared Micromobility Schemes that are currently in operation and future Schemes across Ireland. In addition, the Authority will utilise the Solution to manage shared micromobility services as part of the National Mobility Hub Pilot Schemes and may also utilise the Solution to manage EV car share services as part of the National Mobility Hub Pilot Schemes.The full scope of service requirements can be found in the CFT documentation. The expected term of the Contract will be four (4) years with the option to extend on an annual basis for a further four (4) years. .
